goal: Harden the real-adapter M6-RC runner preflight so an available Docker image is not treated as sufficient unless its exported runtime adapter manifest matches the adapter artifact being submitted. This prevents fixture or stale Docker images from satisfying the remaining real trained adapter endpoint gate. Current release readiness must remain NOT_GO without real trained CUDA lora_adapter endpoint evidence.
head: f9f2499
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Weakening real adapter endpoint evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may harden the real adapter RC runner preflight, add focused tests, generate review evidence, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Preflight requires Docker image adapter manifest to match the submitted adapter artifact when prerequisites are present
Preflight still reports NOT_READY in the current environment without claiming M6-RC GO
v0 release readiness remains NOT_GO with only real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds preflight hardening only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped image-lineage preflight gate after observing existing fixture MIB Docker images could be tagged to satisfy docker_image_available without proving they match the submitted real adapter.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, v0 readiness audit, M6 prereq audit, runner, adapter intake verifier, endpoint capture tool, Dockerfile, and Docker export tests. Docker daemon contains old MIB export images, but mib-export:test is absent; simply tagging a fixture image would not prove it matches the submitted adapter.
phase_notes.build: Added docker_image_adapter_matches_adapter_manifest preflight guard. When adapter manifest adapter_sha256, adapter dir, and image are available, the runner computes /app/adapter aggregate hash inside the image and compares it with the submitted adapter manifest hash. Added focused tests for matching and mismatched image lineage.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused runner pytest, real current preflight expected NOT_READY, generated prereq JSON validation, v0 release readiness expected NOT_GO, generated readiness JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Image lineage preflight hardening is complete. Current environment remains NOT_READY and v0 release readiness remains NOT_GO because real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake endpoint evidence is still absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: RC runner preflight hardening, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
